ast.name: log
ast.target: 卸载文本代码片段插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type here your snippets in format 'snippet : result', one per line. Empty lines will be ignored. Ctrl+Tab to replace (hotkey can be changed).
ast.target: 在此处输入您的代码片段，格式为“片段 : 结果”，每行一个。空行将被忽略。按 Ctrl+Tab 进行替换（快捷键可更改）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Places the cursor to the mark position after inserting a snippet (default: $end$).
Mark does not appear anywhere within the snippet. Do not use together with Stop Symbol.
ast.target: 插入代码片段后，将光标放置在标记位置（默认：$end$）。\n标记不会出现在代码片段的任何位置。请勿与停止符号一起使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Ignores newline after mark, replace it with a newline character after expanding (default: $nl$).
Necessary to write before every line break in multiline snippets.
ast.target: 忽略标记后的换行符，在展开后将其替换为换行符（默认：$nl$）。\n在多行代码片段中，每个换行符前都需要使用此标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbol to jump to when command is called.
ast.target: 调用命令时跳转到的符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbol to be replaced with clipboard content.
ast.target: 将被剪贴板内容替换的符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the Tab key as the trigger.
ast.target: 使用 Tab 键作为触发键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the Space bar button as the trigger.
ast.target: 使用空格键作为触发键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle manually if not correct. You should restart plugin after changing this option.
ast.target: 如果不正确，请手动切换。更改此选项后应重启插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Сharacters for specifying the boundary between separate words.
ast.target: 用于指定单词之间边界的字符。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 文本代码片段 - 设置
